column2: # Remove instances where IndividualsID appears only once = this has a total of 2883 individuals
filter(n() > 1) %>%  # Keep only IndividualIDs that have more than 1 occurrence
# Arrange data by ID and day to make sure values are in correct order
# Calculate 'growthL' by subtracting the first Length value for each ID from the current Length
mutate(growthL = ForkLength_mm - first(ForkLength_mm), growthW = Weight_g - first(Weight_g)) %>%
